testcase.name: shouldReturnProductionWithAnimalSummary

Hibernate: select coalesce(sum(pe1_0.quantity),0) from productions pe1_0 where pe1_0.animal_id=? and pe1_0.status='ACTIVE' Hibernate: select ue1_0.id,ue1_0.active,ue1_0.avatar_url,ue1_0.email,ue1_0.name,ue1_0.password,ue1_0.role from users ue1_0 where ue1_0.id=? Hibernate: select ae1_0.id,ae1_0.acquisition_cost,ae1_0.birth_date,ae1_0.breed,ae1_0.farm_id,ae1_0.origin,ae1_0.sale_date,ae1_0.sale_price,ae1_0.status,ae1_0.tag from animals ae1_0 where ae1_0.id=? Hibernate: select coalesce(sum(pe1_0.quantity),0) from productions pe1_0 where pe1_0.animal_id=? and pe1_0.status='ACTIVE' Hibernate: select coalesce(sum((fe1_0.quantity*fte1_0.cost_per_kg)),0) from feedings fe1_0 join feed_types fte1_0 on fe1_0.feed_type_id=fte1_0.id where fe1_0.animal_id=? and fe1_0.status='ACTIVE' Hibernate: select fe1_0.id from farms fe1_0 where fe1_0.id=? and fe1_0.owner_id=? fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: select count(*) from farms fe1_0 where fe1_0.id=? Hibernate: select mpe1_0.id,mpe1_0.created_at,mpe1_0.created_by,mpe1_0.effective_date,mpe1_0.farm_id,mpe1_0.price from milk_prices mpe1_0 where mpe1_0.farm_id=? and mpe1_0.effective_date<=? order by mpe1_0.effective_date desc,mpe1_0.created_at desc fetch first ? rows only
